data_points.context_provenance: Yields creeping back up as inflation fears price in the $105 Brent baseline, exerting direct pressure on regional bank HTM portfolios.
Slight pullback from ATH. Equity algorithms digesting energy shock but failing to price in systemic credit plumbing decay.
Physical entropy layer locked above $100, cementing the higher-for-longer regime and accelerating structural cash burn.
Synthetic risk assessment driven by regional bank balance sheet paralysis and inability to roll over $1.2T in maturing commercial real estate paper.
